dns.title: DNS Lookup
dns.description: Global DNS resolution with DNS pollution detection across multiple resolvers

meta.title: DNS Lookup — Global DNS Resolution Test | idcd
meta.description: Query DNS records from resolvers worldwide and detect DNS pollution or hijacking. Supports A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME.

helpTips: Target: the domain name to resolve (e.g. example.com)
Record type: A (IPv4), AAAA (IPv6), MX (mail), TXT, CNAME (alias), NS (name server)
Result: DNS resolution result, response time, and authoritative server
Nodes: pick specific nodes; defaults to all available nodes
